missing_coverage: No test case for email format validation (e.g., missing '@' or domain) - related to risk RISK002
No test case for password complexity beyond minimum length (e.g., uppercase, lowercase, digits) - related to risk RISK001
No test case for empty email or password fields
No test case for maximum password length (if any)
No test case for password confirmation/re-enter password field (if applicable)
No test case for account verification process (e.g., email confirmation link)
No test case for special characters in email or password (allowed characters)
No test case for leading/trailing spaces in email or password
duplicate_testcases: TC006 and TC008 both test SQL injection in email and password fields respectively - not duplicates but similar pattern; could be combined into a single security test case for input sanitization
TC007 and TC009 both test XSS in email and password fields respectively - same as above
recommendations: Add test cases for email format validation (e.g., missing '@', invalid domain) to address risk RISK002
Add test cases for password complexity (e.g., at least one uppercase, one lowercase, one digit) to address risk RISK001
Add test cases for empty email and password fields
Add test case for maximum password length (if specified in requirements)
Add test case for password confirmation field (if applicable)
Add test case for account verification process (e.g., email confirmation link)
Add test case for special characters and leading/trailing spaces in email and password
Consider combining TC006/TC008 and TC007/TC009 into single test cases for input sanitization to reduce duplication
Add test case for case sensitivity in email (e.g., 'Test@Example.com' vs 'test@example.com')
Add test case for very long email or password (buffer overflow testing)
